text_original: I just updated the app, and all of a sudden, the text formatting changed for no reason? The text in quotation marks now gets bolded, the app completely ignores how I split paragraphs and puts each sentence into a new paragraph on its own... Completely immersion breaking and very distracting. The last update is horrible. I love the app and I have a yearly sub, but this might put me off it entirely. Please revert the formatting to how it used to be.
text_zh: 我刚更新了应用，突然之间文本格式就无缘无故变了？引号里的文字现在变成了加粗，应用完全忽略了我分段的方式，把每一句话都单独分成一段……这完全破坏了沉浸感，非常让人分心。最后这次更新太糟糕了。我喜欢这个应用，也订阅了年费，但这可能会让我彻底放弃它。请把格式恢复原样。
reply_original:
Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant experience after the update! I understand how the new formatting and paragraph splitting are breaking your immersion.

I have shared your specific feedback about bold text and paragraphing with our dev team for an urgent review. Please email support@fantachat.ai so we can assist you further!
reply_zh:
你好，对于更新后给您带来的不愉快体验，我深表歉意！我理解新的格式和分段方式是如何破坏您的沉浸感的。

我已经将您关于加粗文本和分段的具体反馈分享给了开发团队，以便进行紧急审查。请发送邮件至 support@fantachat.ai，以便我们为您提供进一步协助！
